mapper.sql: exception_id AS "exceptionId", project_id AS "projectId", source_type AS "sourceType", source_id AS "sourceId", source_attempt_id AS "sourceAttemptId", source_task_type AS "sourceTaskType", category_code AS "category", severity_code AS "severity", error_code AS "errorCode", status, work_order_id AS "workOrderId", task_id AS "taskId", handling_task_id AS "handlingTaskId", occurrence_count AS "occurrenceCount", aggregate_version AS "aggregateVersion", opened_at AS "openedAt", last_detected_at AS "lastDetectedAt", acknowledged_at AS "acknowledgedAt", acknowledged_by AS "acknowledgedBy", acknowledgement_note AS "acknowledgementNote", resolved_at AS "resolvedAt", resolution_code AS "resolutionCode"
mapper.select: SELECT exception_id AS "exceptionId", aggregate_version AS "aggregateVersion", acknowledged_at AS "acknowledgedAt", acknowledged_by AS "acknowledgedBy" FROM ops_exception_ack_result WHERE tenant_id = #{tenantId} AND idempotency_key = #{idempotencyKey}
